title: pr-inbox findings
description: Output of the dual-model-review agent, consumed by pr-inbox-web. v1.

schema_version.description: Schema version. Future versions bump this integer.

pr_url.description: Canonical PR URL the review targets.

pr_stable_identity.description: Platform stable identity for rename-safe routing. Optional but recommended.

head_sha.description: HEAD SHA the review was run against. Used for staleness checks before posting.

generated_at_utc.description: Wall-clock time the file was written by the agent.

models.description: Model identifiers used by the review (e.g. opus-4.8, gpt-5.5). If only one model was available, list just that one; do not invent a second.

asymmetry.description: Diagnostic breakdown of model agreement. Free-shape so future tools can extend without a schema bump. If only one model was available, set `single_model: <count>` (total findings from the single model) and omit the cross-model counts.

id.description: Stable per-document id (e.g. f01). Used by pr-inbox-web to track per-finding 'posted' state.

found_by.description: Which models found this. Order is informational; uniqueness is not enforced by schema.

diff_anchorable.description: True when the finding's (file, line) sits inside the diff and is safe to post inline.

title.description: One-line summary; renders as the finding header in pr-inbox-web.

body.description: Multi-line markdown explanation. The body posted as the PR comment.

suggested_inline.description: Optional GitHub ```suggestion code block, including the fence.
